title: jasminum duclouxii
intro: Jasminum duclouxii, also known as the Ducloux's jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is a climbing plant native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Jasminum duclouxii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and relieve pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
